name: chr1_centromere_alpha_satellite
description: Chromosome 1 centromeric alpha-satellite array (D1Z7). Composed of higher-order repeats (HORs) built from 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers. The active centromere CENP-A domain sits within a sub-region of the array. Fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13 (~9 Mb HOR).

architecture.internal_structure: Megabase-scale higher-order alpha-satellite HOR array (D1Z7), monomer 171 bp; flanking pericentric SDs and HSat2/3 blocks; active CENP-A domain typically <1 Mb.
